name: I-95 Attleboro Weigh & Inspection Station
description: MassDOT/Massachusetts State Police fixed truck weigh and inspection station on I-95 just north of the Rhode Island line, with facilities on both the northbound and southbound sides in Attleboro.

name: Americas Best Value Inn Foxboro
description: Budget hotel on Route 1 near Gillette Stadium (I-95 Exit 9) that offers free on-site truck, bus and RV parking.

name: The Peterbilt Store - Boston (The Pete Store)
description: Full-service Peterbilt heavy-truck dealership with truck/trailer repair, parts, alignments, DPF cleaning and mobile service, located on Route 1 near the I-95/I-495 interchange. Driver amenities include showers, laundry and Wi-Fi.

name: Sullivan Tire & Auto Service - Norwood
description: Sullivan Tire service center near I-95/Route 128 in Norwood; a Bridgestone commercial truck-tire dealer offering tire sales and mechanical repair.

name: Foxboro Towing
description: 24/7 towing and roadside recovery operator serving the I-95 corridor including Canton, Sharon, Walpole, Mansfield and North Attleboro.

name: Lexington Service Plaza (Northbound)
description: MassDOT service plaza on I-95/Route 128 northbound (near Exit 30) with 24-hour Gulf fuel, restrooms and food (McDonald's, Honey Dew, pizza); northbound access only, limited parking.

name: M & L Boston Fuel & Wash
description: Full-service truck wash (exterior, undercarriage, reefer/food-grade trailer washouts) with a 24-hour diesel fueling station, at the I-95/128 and I-93 interchange just north of Burlington.

name: J&H Auto & Truck Stop (Peabody Truck Stop)
description: Independent truck stop on US Route 1 just off the I-95/Route 128 split, with 3 diesel lanes, roughly 30 truck parking spaces, driver showers, a store, service bays with tire care and road service, trailer washout, and an on-site restaurant (Red's Kitchen & Tavern). The only genuine full-service truck stop on this segment.

name: Service Tire Truck Centers (STTC) - Peabody
description: Commercial truck tire center serving medium-duty truck, small OTR, farm and industrial tires, with 24-hour mobile road-service tire assistance for the North Shore I-95/Route 128 corridor.

name: Pete's Tire Barns - Woburn
description: Regional commercial tire dealer just off I-95/Route 128, carrying commercial truck, trailer, OTR and industrial tires. Weekday hours only (closed weekends).

name: Murray's Towing & Equipment Services
description: 24-hour towing and heavy-duty recovery operator on the I-95/Route 128 corridor with two heavy wreckers (30-ton and 50-ton), a rotator, Lowbed and Landoll, plus an on-site repair shop; dispatches across Middlesex County.

name: Four Star Towing & Service
description: Long-established 24/7 towing and roadside recovery company on US Route 1 at the I-95/Route 128 split, handling light through heavy-duty truck towing; serves Peabody, Danvers and Massachusetts State Police.

name: I-95 Weigh & Inspection Station (Rowley)
description: Fixed MassDOT/Massachusetts State Police truck weigh and inspection station on I-95 in Rowley (near the Georgetown/Rowley line), with facilities on both the northbound and southbound sides used for commercial vehicle enforcement.

name: I-95 Newbury Rest Area (Northbound)
description: Small MassDOT roadside rest area on northbound I-95 at about mile marker 77 with restrooms and limited parking; a matching southbound parking area sits opposite. No fuel or food services.

name: Newburyport Park & Ride
description: Free MassDOT park-and-ride lot at I-95 Exit 57 (Route 113) with about 605 fenced, lit spaces; overnight parking is permitted at your own risk. Primarily a commuter/car lot, not a dedicated truck facility.

name: I-95 Salisbury Massachusetts Welcome Center (Southbound)
address: I-95 Southbound near mile marker 90 (at the NH state line)
description: MassDOT welcome center / rest area on southbound I-95 just inside Massachusetts at the New Hampshire line, offering restrooms, tourist information and parking. No fuel or truck-service amenities.
